overview: The Wausau Board of Public Works held a brief meeting to open bids and award the 2026 asphalt paving project. RC Pavers was awarded the contract with the low bid of $824,146.34, beating American's bid of $849,872.10.

agenda.item: Open bids and make recommendation for 2026 asphalt paving project

discussions.body: Two bids were opened for the asphalt paving project. RC Pavers submitted the low bid at $824,146.34, while American bid $849,872.10. A motion was made to approve RC Pavers as the contractor. The motion was seconded and passed unanimously with all members voting 'aye'.

actionItems: RC Pavers awarded the 2026 asphalt paving project contract at $824,146.34
title: Wausau Board of Public Works Meeting
